description: Retrieval, deduplication, source quality, and citation tasks.

verifier.pass_signal: claims have relevant sources and dates

mini_tasks.goal: Find two primary sources for the Octopus project release page and summarize what each proves.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Two links with dates, claim coverage, and unsupported gaps.

mini_tasks.goal: Audit three local project docs for the install/start path and report any mismatched commands or missing evidence.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Three source paths, command snippets, agreement or mismatch notes, and remaining gaps.

mini_tasks.goal: Compare three sources for one release claim, deduplicate overlapping evidence, and mark the strongest source.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Three sources, deduplicated claim table, strongest-source rationale, dates, and unsupported gaps.

mini_tasks.goal: Audit four sources for one Octopus release claim, rank each source by authority and freshness, deduplicate overlapping evidence, and identify stale or unsupported gaps.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Four sources with dates, source-type ranking, deduplicated release-claim coverage, strongest-source rationale, stale/unsupported gaps, and verifier evidence.
